svg.title: AI ticket handling system — overall architecture
svg.desc: Three-layer architecture: intake channels feed a multi-agent processing layer, which writes to a persistence layer, with outputs to a human dashboard and analytics.

g.text: Web form · Email parser · Slack bot

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What does the triage agent do in the ticket system?')
sendPrompt('How does the router agent decide between auto-resolve and human escalation?')
sendPrompt('How does the resolver agent auto-resolve tickets using RAG?')
sendPrompt('What does the escalation agent prepare for human agents?')
sendPrompt('What kinds of questions can the analytics agent answer?')
g.text: NL → SQL · queue stats · SLA reports

svg.text: ↻ human corrections feed back into RAG knowledge base
cyclic graph — agents loop until ticket is resolved or escalated

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What does the human agent dashboard show?')
sendPrompt('What does the manager analytics view show?')
sendPrompt('How does the resolved ticket reach the employee?')
